message: Channel established. Read handoff/PROTOCOL.md, then docs/06-Roadmap/Mac-Studio-Operator-Brief.md. Overwrite handoff/from-mac/STATUS.json each cycle so I can see Spark/GPU state + blockers.
openPriorities: P0-A: SSH the Spark, pin a working peft/transformers so PeftModel.merge_and_unload succeeds on OLMoE fused experts, then re-cert v5 (96/96 merged) -> first TRUE v5 top1. Log to the ledger.
P0-B: deploy + supervise scripts/spark/2026-06-30-poller-idle-backlog.patch on the Spark (GPU 24/7); restart poller; watch a few ticks.
P1: apply the virtues-script-merge + faithfulness allowlist patches; run the 70B MLX judge lane concurrently.
P2: v6 QAT train per docs/06-Roadmap/QAT-v6-Recipe-Proposal.md (needs owner approval before the long run).
guardrails: canClaimAGI=false; lint_claims before commit; no plaintext secrets; push code only to claude/sophia-positioning-gaps-84kb0v; --run-train needs owner approvedBy; JUDGE_HOLD keeps judging first-class.
